notes: Adds eight new Tater Tube themes—TaterVision '87, Broadcast Test, Cable After Midnight, Public Access, Woodgrain Console, Tater Satellite, Haunted Tape, and Saturday Morning—each with its own matching animated background.
Carries the selected theme consistently through the main menu, settings, tuning screens, and every Player module while keeping the original themes and custom colors available.
Refreshes the boot and update artwork with separate widescreen HDMI and overscan-safe CRT compositions, selected automatically for the connected display.
